name: Wheaten Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the whole wheat and all-purpose flours, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg.
2. Make a well in the center; add buttermilk and orange rind.
3. Mix just until the dough is soft but not sticky.
4. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
5. Knead for 10 times.
6. Place the dough into a greased 8 x 4 inch loaf pan.
7. Bake in a 350°F (180°C) oven for 20 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 300°F (150°C); bake for 25 to 30 minutes longer, or until a cake tester inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean.
9. Turn out onto a wire rack.
